calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Instructing Clerk To Enter Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-22-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER INSTRUCTING CLERK TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The motion to direct the clerk to enter default and default judgment is denied without prejudice. Moving party does not provide evidence with its moving papers that it is entitled to relief. Specifically, it does not provide proof that it submitted a venue declaration with its default packet. Counsel to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
